summary: Completed testing of Team Member Name functionality. All P0 and P1 features working correctly: PATCH /api/team/{member_id}/name updates name in DB, GET /api/team returns name field for all members, TeamPage edit dialog allows changing member name, BookingsPage lecturer dropdown shows member names (with email fallback for members without name).

issues: One team member (test@budezivo.cz) shows email instead of name because name field is empty string in DB - this is expected fallback behavior

critical_code_review_comments: TeamMember Pydantic schema now correctly includes 'name: Optional[str] = None' and 'status: Optional[str] = None' fields with extra='ignore' config
BookingsPage.js correctly uses 'member.name || member.email' fallback for lecturer dropdown display (line 545-546)
TeamPage.js edit dialog correctly shows and updates member name via PATCH /api/team/{member_id}/name endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team member name functionality fully tested. All 7 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: TeamPage shows member names, edit dialog works, BookingsPage lecturer dropdown shows names with email fallback. Test members: demo@budezivo.cz (name='Demo Admin'), test-kolega@example.com (name='Jan Novák'), invited_6bbf94e7@budezivo.cz (name='Test Invited User'), test@budezivo.cz (name='' - empty string).

backend_api.GET /api/team: PASS - Returns name field for all members
backend_api.PATCH /api/team/{member_id}/name: PASS - Updates name in DB and persists
backend_api.GET /api/invitations/pending: PASS - Returns name field in pending invitations

frontend_ui.TeamPage loads: PASS - Shows 4 team members with names
frontend_ui.TeamPage member cards: PASS - Display name (or email fallback) for each member
frontend_ui.TeamPage edit button: PASS - 3 edit buttons visible (not for current user)
frontend_ui.TeamPage edit dialog: PASS - Shows name input with current value, role selection, save/remove buttons
frontend_ui.BookingsPage booking detail modal: PASS - Opens with lecturer assignment section
frontend_ui.BookingsPage lecturer dropdown: PASS - Shows 4 options with names (email fallback for empty name)

verified_fixes.status: FIXED - name: Optional[str] = None added to schema at line 265
verified_fixes.verification: GET /api/team now returns name field for all members
